reviews.review_description:
I honestly have been trying to find a replacement game because I suck at this game, but the fact is there is no other VR game that can match this level of realism. The guns are amazing, the environments are realistic and interesting. 

My only request is you make the characters have a defining feature to signal which team they are on. 

My major frustration is that I never shoot in enemy because I'm afraid to shoot a team mate. It is a skill issue yes I know, but it would be a lot more fun for me if, for example, the helmets were a certain color, or the Volk were darker with red features and the Marsoc were slightly more tan with blue. 

Other than that there is also a slight hacker problem I've seen 1/100 games on average so please also fix that. 

Also it would be cool if you make an in game self-mute button.

Recent reviews have been all about toxic players but that’s because all the good ones left I have played this game for about three years now on many different accounts and I remember when there would be 12 pages of servers but the game is dying it needs more players😔 it’s probably the end for onward

So I have been playing this game for about a year now, the community still surprises me everyday I play. In the way of toxicity and racism… love the game tho! But if you are interested in getting this game, don’t be expecting ANY updates at all. But be aware of the racist 40 year olds and the toxic 12 years olds

I have been playing this game since update 1.14 2 years ago, and it is my favorite vr shooter by far and I am disappointed they stopped working on this game. There are, on average, about 70-80 servers open a day, and not that many people play it anymore, but it still surprisingly gets new players. I still play this game the most out of any vr game I own, and I can't wait to see downpour interactive's new game that is currently in the works.

I’ve been playing for about 2 years now and the community has absolutely gone to crap it’s unfortunate that people who are new have to deal with raiders constantly joining and terrorizing servers with no ￼repercussions this game and all of its players have gone down the drain do not buy.

reviews.review_description: I see alot of reviews talking about the people saying N words and harassing people . MAYBE YOUR SKIN AINT TOUGH ENOUGH TO PLAY ONWARD THEN 🤣 . HOW CAN YOU SHOOT PEOPLE AND COMPLAIN ABOUT "OFFENSIVE Words" ... ITS JUST A GAME, TOO MANY OF YALL ARE FRAGILE AS F***..

The game is all fun and all but there is way to much toxicity it’s just crazy not only that in load out there are way to much players that just goes around the map and team kills and it genuinely pisses me off having to deal with this for 10 straight minutes or more for actual assault matches teammates doesn’t tell any formations so we just keep having to die every second all the good players left this game I don’t know why but it’s just sad I would still give it a 5 star because of the gun mechanics and how funny it is to kill players jokingly but overall its a 4.9 star for me

Only things is the game and community activeness is slowly dying and I'm not sure why cuz this is one of the most fun I've ever had playing a shooter

Fix the game. it’s honestly a good game but you need to get better at getting rid of hackers there was a hacker in my lobby that i was playing in throwing flash bangs everywhere and dropping and getting rid all of our bullets in our mags. and if you see this Carter1432 sleep with one eye open. because i play on a normal 3S don’t even know how to get hacks on onward like i haven’t been playing for more then 1 month  and they still accused me for using hacks. so all i gotta say is fix your game pls

This game should be the best fps on the market! I've been playing this game for years and have always thought they would fix this blaring problem with the game! The footsteps volume in this game is ridiculous! I am walking ON MY BUTT, literally sitting down, and someone can hear my footsteps, through 20ft of concrete! You can't sneak at all in this game! Not even sneak, just trying to be quiet. You can hear them and they hear you. Update 2.0 made the game even worse! The guns sound worse, you can't tell friend from enemy because the camo all looks alike. This game use to be good, should have been great, and ended up okay.

I just wanted to have fun on this game with other people in training, but every sever I made, there was a hacker, after my 5th server I went up to the hacker that was hiding up on the hill, I was  holding my knife because all our ammo was being taken, I asked him "why do hacks?" And then he pointed his hand to me and my game froze, and I couldn't report him because his name was not on ether list, these are new updates with the same problem.
It is fun,realistic,and the guns are amazing.But the player count is getting low.please revive onward.i have been playing this game for  2 years now and I still love it!

reviews.review_title: Great game sad to see it go
reviews.review_description: This is a great game, it has tons of maps. The leaderboard is still running hot in mercenary. But I’m sad the devs moved on to other things. They almost had it perfect.

Please add transmit as a coop single mission please. It's on mercenary mode and multiplayer, but not as a co-op against AI single mission. It's too risky to try it in mercenary but it's our favorite mission type. I'll bump it back to 5 star

I own 2 Quest 3 headsets. This game is fun and pretty cool. I know we were able to play at one stage together but now I cant. Seems I must buy this again. It seems this is one of the few games that does not have that feature so you must buy it for each headset.  I however run both on my account so have to setup a whole new person to "own" other headset just to play Onward multiplayer. Or I'm understanding this incorrectly.  Bottom line looks like another buy for a farily expensive game...so guess not going to. If any admin reads this please let know if I assume correctly. I dont want to set up whole new account, payment setup etc and then still battle to play 2 headsets. Ps. The 2nd one if I log in as holder multiplayer is there. If I choose other accout (yes app sharing is switched on) multuplayer not available.

reviews.review_title: Been an honor to serve marsoc...
reviews.review_description: Wtf happened within the last week?? the community Is HORRID NOW. EVERY LOBBY I JOIN IS ONLY TEAM KILLERS. AND THE PUNISH SYSTEM IS EVEN WORSE. IT WONT KICK ANYMORE. IT NEVER DID. AND CAN WE GET A MODERATION TEAM THAT DOES THEIR JOB??? SO MUCH N WORDS. EXTREMELY TOXIC. aside from that it's OK, don't call it super immirsive if I don't have a body, and add a desert eagle and good grip animations on pistols. That will make up for your bad community. bots are also bad now. Also, there's a lot of bad stuff that was better originally. Mk16 or the scar type gun that's not the actual scar should get it's yellow color back, and the mk18 had a Grey color on it, why remove that? The gloves looked better back then. Also alot of the guns sound bad without a suppressor, and a suppressor is 4 points! 4 points just for not getting eargraped. Does not apply with akm, sounds shissse either way. Aside from that, I fricking love this game, but it's no longer social and it's dying. Shooting range is a social place and no one is talking, no one has mics, people to talk to was one of the things distracting me and others from this weird, kind of bad world. There is no where near as much servers like it once was. Do yourself a favor and buy something else. Anything else, blade and sorcery, bonelab, into the radius, pavlov, or just go back in time to go to old onward.
the community is not the very greatest and not so welcoming to new players. also they have very bad angles in this game that is unfair especially to spawn campers

reviews.review_title: How Not to Port a Game..
reviews.review_description:
This is a technically inept port that should never have passed certification. The graphics are genuinely dreadful, reminding me of the worst of the original PlayStation. Texture work is shoddy, models pop in constantly, and palm trees look like primary school craft projects. Enemy combatants are nearly impossible to spot among the visual mess, making tactical play a joke. 

The technical problems run deeper than presentation. Bullets pass through solid walls but won't go through invisible window glass. Hitboxes don't match models. Positional audio is inadequate for a game claiming to be a serious mil sim. 

Menus don't orient to the player properly, and the game causes brief freezes that can make you queasy. There are moments when coordinating with friends offers glimpses of what this could have been, but they're drowned by the sheer volume of mistakes. 

Far better experiences exist on SideQuest for free. For the full review, search YouTube for 6DOF Reviews Onward.

reviews.review_title: I played many hours, I did love the game
reviews.review_description: As I said I have a lot of time in match and I enjoyed most of it, the community is a but dry rn, but my real problem is they took out my favorite guns, G3A3 and M1911. I know it doesn’t sound like a big deal but, they were more than half the reason I played this game, I loved the variety and the way they felt, without my favorite guns, I see no reason to play this game, over another game that actually has the equipment I like I spent a fair amount of time in the shooting range enjoying the way the guns felt, but now I have to find a new shooting range l. It was a good game but they don’t seem to mind changing the aspects of the game that I love.

I know there’s a lot of reviews out there complaining about the toxic community but it’s a big problem because I just recently played and this guy completely has meltdown over a accidental team kill because he didn’t answer me when I said friendly before entering a room so of course I’m gonna shoot whoever I see and the thing is I only downed him and I would of revived him but then he completely lost it and starting calling me all kinds of slurs and just spammed the n word the second he got downed and blames me for his mistake and the crazy thing is the mode was assault that has RESPAWNS and we was even on the volk team with unlimited respawns and then he kept on killing me and still blamed me for team killing,this is a great game but people like him will cause this game to die forever

As someone who's used real weapons, played airsoft, and prefers more of realistic simulation, onward nails that, even with body armor you can't just take a bunch of shots and keep walking, you don't get unlimited ammo unless you sit next to an ammo box. You actually have to be strategic, be careful with your shots, and keep cover. If you're looking for a realistic Sim shooter, this in my opinion, is the best one I've tried so far. Please don't let this game go underrated.

reviews.review_description: Would it kill the devs to add better guns physics like in pavlov shack? I also wouldn't mind a crouch button, my knees are on fire.

I played for a hot minute and find while sometimes skill based there are just lobbies plauged with hackers campers lil kids and whats bad is there ard no devs they quit.., so no ban or moderization for anyone.

Every time i load on to the game there is always a hacker or toxic person who trash talk and ruin the game. No one is sorting out all the annoying hackers. They have explosive ammo, invincibility, and the ability to ban and kick people from the game. Sort it out.

I played the game for about 3 months now. It is a good game. It is for people who want to take it a little seriously and try to play tactically. The key is to find some friends to play with and create own in-game server. It is super easy. Otherwise the lobby is usually full of kids. Even the single player is entertaining and practice brings rewards. I use quest 3 with QGO on HD settings for better graphics. I recommend this game to all who want a team based shooter with military unit tactical aspect.

Amazing game just dosnt get updated as much as it needs to be

Overall this is a really good game. It has its problems sure. Every game does. But part of its charm is the freedom to do what you want to in a mil sim. Are there allot of team kills? Yes, Underage kids, sure. Annoying rage baiters and racism. Yea that too. But out of the thousands of games I’ve played most of the players have a strong sense of community. If some one decides to pick on a little kid or get racist or not apologize for team killing the whole lobby bands together and keep the space respectable. And there is allot of trash talking. But most of it is healthy and lighthearted. Maybe not the greatest game to have a young child playing but in that sense is it really that different from Call of duty. The big difference is the lobbies are in the players hands. If you have a problem voice it in your lobby and the players will either agree with you or not all the complaints I’ve seen on here are purely becuse people can’t fathom a game being in the hands of the players but in my opinion. That’s exactly how it should be love this game even with its flaws it’s a great community overall don’t let a few bad apples ruin your experience or view of an otherwise great game

VR gaming is still in a rudimentary state rn but this game although not the prettiest, displays a vision for the future of hardcore VR FPS games.

I also love this game because the weapons are so balanced and every one is super unique and can be used in different ways. reviews.review_title: Games are supposed to be fun:)
reviews.review_description: Awesome game, many of the 1 stars are from things that have nothing to do with the game itself, if you can’t take being team killed or bad mouthed by some bratty little shiet whose parents are into gentle parenting, don’t play the game. P.S: There is nothing wrong with that, there are other games that are just as fun, or switch to a different lobby, but don’t hate on the game just because a portion of the community sucks. Games are supposed to be fun.

this game used to be the most fun game i've ever played. ever since they did the two point oh update it's the worst game ever they changed the color scheme so you can't tell who's your alley and who's your enemy. they change the sound of the guns so it sounds really cartoonish. all of which i could get over but the fact that they didn't fix the footsteps in this game should be a sin. you will literally be behind seven feet of cement crouching while trying to go as slow as possible and the enemy will still hear your footsteps and be able to tell where exactly you are in the game. you can't talk to your allies because the enemy will hear you no matter where you are in the map. to be honest if they just footsteps out of this game entirely it would be 1000% better. i this game is a lot of fun up until you get good at the game and actually try to sneak up on the enemy men is just annoying is all hell. i would spend your money elsewhere until they fix this issue

reviews.review_title: The best Shooter game I have played

This game is really good and a little bit realistic.

reviews.review_title: Get rid of hackers and children
reviews.review_description: About 30% or more people on this game are hackers. Tell me how I can snipe a man 5 times or less on Vietnam map (the best map in the game) and he won't die? And before you say "oh maybe you missed all those shots", I know I hit the shots because I saw red splatter through my sniper crosshairs. Also, tell me "well, you shouldve just reported him." and I will tell you "He put riot shields on the team boards for both of our teams." Now don't get me wrong, I love this game. But one thing I love the most about it is that if you're a child, you are basically cooked. Most children from ages 7 to 10 are so stupid to where they don't have combat IQ and don't read weapon stats. I would give this game 5 stars if it wasn't for literal kids and those darn hackers.
